ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 "cat > /tmp/check_ollama2.py << 'PYEOF'
import json
with open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json') as f:
    c = json.load(f)
print('models section:', json.dumps(c.get('models', {}), indent=2))
print('plugins ollama:', json.dumps(c.get('plugins', {}).get('entries', {}).get('ollama', {}), indent=2))
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/check_ollama2.py"
